title: Greg Brockman consolidates OpenAI's product teams to build an "agentic future"
summary: Greg Brockman consolidates OpenAI's product teams to build an "agentic future"
whyItMatters: OpenAI is merging ChatGPT, its coding agent Codex, and the developer API into a single product team led by Codex boss Thibault Sottiaux. The goal: a "super app" that also integrates the Atlas browser. Co-founder Greg Brockman officially takes over product strategy.
